comment: Two rows have latitude values outside [-90, 90] and longitude values outside [-180, 180]. Verifies that out-of-range WGS-84 coordinates surface as a user-friendly transformation error via stop_if_entity_invalid().
expected_technical_error_regex: latitude value\(s\) are outside the WGS-84 range \[-90, 90\]
expected_user_error_regex: latitude value\(s\) are outside the WGS-84 range \[-90, 90\]
